page: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-192-metal is a bare metal server configured with 192 vCPUs across 96 physical Intel Xeon 8481C cores. Operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this dedicated CPU allocation features 105 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for matrix multiplication and integer operations. The system is equipped with 1.5 TB of high-speed DDR5 memory running at 5 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. No local storage or GPUs are bundled with this instance.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, scoring in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU tests and PassMark CPU suites. Memory performance is highly efficient, with DDR5 memory bandwidth reaching top-tier status in both cached small-block and uncached large-block read/write operations. Cryptographic and database operations also rank in the top 10%, highlighted by high-throughput Redis SET operations and PassMark database execution. Single-core performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression sit in the average tier, while LLM inference tasks show strong prompt processing speeds across small, medium, and large models.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the bare metal architecture eliminates virtualization overhead, maximizing the return on the high-density 192-vCPU and 1.5 TB DDR5 memory configuration. This resource density makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive compute workloads, large-scale database operations, and high-throughput static web serving. The inclusion of Intel AMX instructions also supports CPU-based machine learning inference and software compilation without requiring dedicated GPU hardware.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-192-metal is a bare metal server featuring 192 dedicated vCPUs from Intel Xeon 8481C processors running at 4.0 GHz, paired with 1.5 TB of 5 GHz DDR5 memory. Lacking local storage and GPUs, this instance relies on its high-density memory architecture and advanced CPU instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and high-throughput database operations. It is designed for memory-intensive compute workloads, large-scale databases, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-192-metal is a bare metal server featuring 192 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1.5 TB of DDR5 RAM, and top-tier multi-core and database benchmark performance.

tagline: A high-density bare metal platform delivering massive multi-core compute power and high-speed DDR5 memory for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors at 4.0 GHz
1.5 TB of high-speed 5 GHz DDR5 memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmark performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Bare metal architecture with zero virtualization overhead and no bundled local storage
Best suited for large-scale databases, software compilation, and CPU-based LLM inference
